prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Here's a short pep talk to get you started:

"Listen, I know you've been putting this task off all morning, but here's the thing: you're not a procrastinator, you're a strategist. You're taking the time to prepare, to think, and to get yourself in the right mindset. That's not laziness, that's intelligence.

You've got this. You've accomplished tough things before, and you can do it again. Break it down into smaller, manageable chunks if you need to. Take a few deep breaths, grab a cup of coffee or water, and remind yourself why this task is important.

You're not just doing this task for the sake of checking it off your list. You're doing it because it's going to make a difference. It's going to move you closer to your goals, and it's going to make you feel proud of yourself when you're done.

So take a deep breath, stand up straight, and get to work. You've got this. You're capable, you're strong, and you're going to crush this task. Go out there and show yourself what you're made of!"
